overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting neon lights, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, massive digital billboards, and a distinctive golden geometric building facade. The camera moves along a sidewalk beneath an elevated structure, briefly passing a parking garage entrance.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking forward beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The wet pavement reflects neon lights from surrounding buildings. A black sedan passes by on the left while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk along the sidewalk. A large parking garage building dominates the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking past a bus stop area where pedestrians sit on illuminated benches. Large digital billboards displaying advertisements line the left side of the street, while the distinctive golden geometric building becomes visible in the distance. The parking garage remains prominent on the right as the camera moves forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to enter a multi-story parking garage, revealing the interior with concrete ramps, parked vehicles, and industrial ventilation pipes. After a brief look inside, the camera turns left to exit back onto the sidewalk, passing yellow safety barriers at the entrance.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk past illuminated benches where pedestrians are seated. The massive golden geometric building now dominates the left side of the frame at close range, while palm trees line the right side. The scene maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere with neon reflections on the wet pavement as the camera approaches a group of pedestrians ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk street that transitions from the shadow of an elevated highway to the presence of a massive golden architectural landmark. It begins beneath a heavy highway structure where wet pavement reflects vibrant lights and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass a large parking garage. As the camera moves forward past illuminated bus stop benches and towering digital billboards, the distinctive golden geometric building emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera briefly turns right to enter the concrete interior of the parking garage, revealing industrial pipes and parked cars before turning left to exit back onto the sidewalk past yellow safety barriers. Finally, the camera continues its path as the golden building now dominates the left side of the frame, flanked by palm trees on the right and a crowd of pedestrians ahead.
